title: ScriptureFlow Bible Data Input
description: Run a lightweight ScriptureFlow lookup. Use catalog mode to discover and filter available translations, catalogSummary mode to summarize catalog coverage, translation_books mode to list book metadata for a selected translation, passage mode with either reference or structured book/chapter/verse input, or validate_reference mode to check whether a simple Bible reference resolves.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Choose the ScriptureFlow operation. Supported modes are catalog, catalogSummary, passage, validate_reference, and translation_books.

translationId.title: Translation ID
translationId.description: Exact ScriptureFlow translation key, such as en-kjv or swh-onen. Required by passage, validate_reference, and translation_books modes.

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: Simple Bible reference for passage or validate_reference mode, best for English/canonical free-text references. For localized book names returned by translation_books, use structured book, chapter, verse, and optional endVerse fields instead. Supported examples include John 3:16, John 3:16-18, Romans 8:28-30, Psalm 23, and 1 John 1:9. Complex multi-reference input is not supported.

book.title: Book
book.description: Structured passage book value, especially useful for localized book names or bookSlug values returned by translation_books. Example: yohana with translationId swh-onen.

chapter.title: Chapter
chapter.description: Structured passage chapter number. Required when any structured passage field is used.

verse.title: Verse
verse.description: Structured passage starting verse number. Required when any structured passage field is used.

endVerse.title: End verse
endVerse.description: Optional same-chapter ending verse for structured passage ranges. Must be greater than or equal to verse.

languageCode.title: Language code
languageCode.description: Optional language code filter for catalog mode, for example eng. Leave empty to return all catalog rows up to maxResults.

search.title: Catalog search
search.description: Optional search term for catalog mode. Searches safe catalog fields such as translation ID, translation name, language code, and language name when available.

fullBibleOnly.title: Full Bible only
fullBibleOnly.description: Optional catalog filter. When true, returns only translations with catalog metadata indicating at least 66 books and 1,189 chapters.

includeMetadata.title: Include metadata
includeMetadata.description: Include available non-text ScriptureFlow metadata in verse rows, such as source path, API path, ID, and input reference.

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of catalog or translation_books rows to write. This does not limit passage mode, which writes one row per resolved verse.
